Description
GAF Timberline HDZ Shingle Overlay (Title 24 Complaint)
This proposal is based on the assumption of 1 layer - if your roof has more than one layer we will not be able to preform this
installation per city code.
Thoroughly inspect wood members for deficiencies.
Where deficiencies are found, replace wood substrate as necessary at an additional cost to the owner (Please see
authorization page for wood replacement if needed)
Furnish and Install New Edge Metal Trim (Color to be determined by owner and submitted in writing prior to commencement
of work)
Starting at the low point of the roof install GAF Timberline HDZ Cool Roof Shingles. (Color to be determined by owner and
submitted in writing prior to commencement of work).
Composition shingles to be installed per manufacturers specifications
On Hip and Ridge install Premium High Rise Caps
Remove and haul away all debris caused by roofing
Payment due upon completion of work, completion report to be sent to owner prior to requesting final invoice
City Permits to be pulled by Green Ladder Roofing and reimbursed by client after purchase
Warranty
10 YEAR WORKMANSHIP WARRANTY
GAF LIFETIME SYSTEM PLUS WARRANTY
-GAF LIFETIME WARRANTY
-GAF ACCESSORY WARRANTY
-50 YEAR UP-FRONT COVERAGE PERIOD
-COST OF INSTALLATION LABOR INCLUDED
*ONLY AVAILABLE TO GAF CERTIFIED ROOFING CONTRACTORS*
Quote subtotal $16,765.79
Total $16,765.79
Completion Report To Be Sent To Owner Prior To Requesting Final Invoice
